name: Central Florida Pawn
description_short: Central Florida Pawn is a licensed firearms dealer and pawn shop in Orange City, FL specializing in handguns, rifles, and shotguns with over 500 in-stock inventory.
description_long:
Central Florida Pawn operates as a full-service firearms retailer and pawn shop located at 1065 N. Volusia Ave in Orange City, Florida. The business is licensed as a Federal Firearms Licensee (FFL) and maintains inventory across multiple online marketplaces including Gunbroker and Armslist, in addition to their physical storefront. They have been serving the local Central Florida community with both retail sales and pawn services.

The company specializes in firearms inventory with over 500 units regularly in stock, including handguns (Smith & Wesson, Glock, Colt, Ruger, Taurus), revolvers (Cimarron SA, Taylor & Company, North American Arms), rifles, and shotguns. They offer special ordering through Gallery of Guns and their own online store (shop.centralfloridapawn.com) with a 25% stocking fee on incomplete orders. The business facilitates firearm transfers for both local customers and out-of-state buyers shipping to licensed dealers, offers 90-day layaway programs with 25% deposits, and provides private party transfer services compliant with Florida and federal law.

Central Florida Pawn distinguishes itself through multiple sales channels and logistics flexibility. They accept incoming transfers from other FFLs at $35 per firearm, maintain compliance with state-specific regulations (including California's CFLC program), and offer layaway options for both in-store and Gunbroker listings. The business provides transparent fee structures ($35 for private party transfers, $50 plus shipping for outgoing dealer transfers) and maintains direct communication through phone, email, and social media for inventory inquiries.

The business model is straightforward but carries inherent limitations. All purchases require federal background checks through the Florida Department of Law Enforcement and comply with Florida's mandatory 3-day waiting period (except for CCW permit holders or exemptions). The company strictly adheres to federal firearms regulations, requires state-issued photo ID with current address, and prohibits shipments from non-licensed parties. This is a specialized niche business best suited for legally qualified firearm purchasers in Florida and surrounding regions rather than general consumers seeking credit or financial services.
address: 1065 N Volusia Ave, Orange City, FL 32763

company_info.headquarters: 1065 N Volusia Ave, Orange City, FL 32763

pros: Large inventory of over 500 firearms regularly in stock across multiple brands and types
Multiple purchasing channels: in-store, Gunbroker auctions with shipping, Armslist local pickup, and special orders through Gallery of Guns
Transparent fee structure with reasonable transfer rates ($35 for private party transfers, $35 for incoming FFL transfers, $50 for outgoing)
90-day layaway program available for qualified purchases with clear 25% non-refundable deposit requirement
Accepts incoming transfers from other FFLs, enabling customers to purchase from other dealers and receive at this location
Compliance with state-specific regulations including California CFLC program and out-of-state shipping accommodations
Multiple communication channels: phone (386-774-7296), email (centralfloridapawn@cfl.rr.com), and social media for inventory updates
cons: 25% non-refundable stocking fee on special orders that remain incomplete, creating financial risk for customers
All firearm purchases subject to mandatory 3-day Florida waiting period (except CCW permit holders), limiting quick access
Out-of-state customers cannot access local inventory directly; must ship to their own FFL dealer, adding complexity and cost
Private party transfers require both parties present in person, limiting convenience for remote transactions
No information about pawn loan terms, interest rates, or collateral values on the firearms-focused webpage
best_for: Florida-based firearm enthusiasts and collectors seeking diverse inventory and multiple purchase channels
Out-of-state buyers needing FFL transfer services and compliance with their local firearms regulations
CCW permit holders seeking quick purchases without waiting period delays
Individuals wanting to transfer privately-owned firearms through a licensed dealer with full compliance
diagnosis: Central Florida Pawn is best for legally qualified firearm purchasers in Florida seeking diverse inventory, multiple purchasing channels, and FFL transfer services. The main caveat is that this is a specialized firearms retailer—not a general pawn shop or credit service—and all purchases are subject to federal background checks, Florida's 3-day waiting period, and strict firearms regulations that vary by state.
services: Retail sales of handguns, rifles, and shotguns from major manufacturers
Special order firearms through Gallery of Guns and shop.centralfloridapawn.com with 25% stocking fee
Gunbroker auctions with local pickup or shipping to licensed dealers
Armslist local pickup listings (Florida residents only)
In-store firearm purchases with mandatory 3-day waiting period and background checks
90-day layaway program with 25% non-refundable deposit (in-store and Gunbroker fixed price)
Incoming firearm transfers from other FFLs for $35 per firearm including background check
Outgoing firearm transfers to other dealers for $50 plus shipping
Private party firearm transfers for $35 including background check (both parties must be present)
Out-of-state shipping accommodations to licensed dealers with additional fees
California CFLC program compliance and firearm legality verification
Social media inventory updates on Facebook and Instagram
meta_description: Central Florida Pawn is a licensed firearms dealer and pawn shop in Orange City, FL with over 500 guns in stock.
